section_name: Applicability to Certain Owners and Operators
text: If an owner or operator of a motor vehicle involved in a collision in this state does not have a driver’s license or vehicle registration or is a nonresident, the person may not be issued a driver’s license or registration until the person has complied with this chapter to the same extent that would be necessary if, at the time of the collision, the person had a driver’s license or registration.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.006 — Applicability to Certain Owners and Operators

If an owner or operator of a motor vehicle involved in a collision in this state does not have a driver’s license or vehicle registration or is a nonresident, the person may not be issued a driver’s license or registration until the person has complied with this chapter to the same extent that would be necessary if, at the time of the collision, the person had a driver’s license or registration.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 64, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.text: If an owner or operator of a motor vehicle involved in a collision in this state does not have a driver’s license or vehicle registration or is a nonresident, the person may not be issued a driver’s license or registration until the person has complied with this chapter to the same extent that would be necessary if, at the time of the collision, the person had a driver’s license or registration.
